data.body: AC amendment (gap-6): .test-index verification. After adding both source→test mappings (ticket-lib-api.sh and ticket dispatcher → test-ticket-lib-api.sh), verify pre-commit-test-gate.sh detects the mapping by confirming .test-index entries exist for both source files mapped to the new test file. This is already captured in the main ACs — confirming it is sufficient (no new task needed).
